ratings.comment: Prof Conn is a wonderful professor! She cares deeply about what she does and she's very willing to help her students! This class was amazing and I definitely recommend taking it.

Professor Conn is amazing! As long as you participate and do all of the assignments you are guaranteed a good grade. She is very knowledgeable about the foster care system and adoption. We also had a few guest speakers that work in various fields
Audrey cares SO SO much about students, so accommodating. Lecture style is clear and interesting. No tests, just papers which are very manageable. Great class.

Audrey really wants her students to leave the class with a good understanding of the days lesson! All readings and articles are interesting and relevant! Discussion is mandatory for participation grade but she make it easy and comfortable to do so! Audrey is very knowledgeable about the Foster Care system and Adoption Services. Would take again!
Wonderful instructor. She makes you work really hard but you can easily get an A if you do all the work. Very friendly and easygoing person, very approachable. I would take her class again.
